title: ATTACH authorization fails when database name is not a literal
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00);
CREATE TABLE dynamic_table (ref_id INT, description VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
INSERT INTO dynamic_table (ref_id, description) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = 'example'), 'dynamic entry');
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS non_literal_db;
key_bug_features: ATTACH authorization fails with non-literal database names
